# Lyt.js -- Full API Reference

> 零依赖超轻量前端框架 v3.1.0
> License: MIT | Author: idcu <idcu@qq.com>
> npm: `lyt` (aggregate package)

## 目录

- [项目概览](#项目概览)
- [架构设计](#架构设计)
- [核心包列表](#核心包列表)
- [模板语法](#模板语法)
- [响应式系统 (@lytjs/reactivity)](#响应式系统)
- [组件系统 (@lytjs/component)](#组件系统)
- [应用核心 (@lytjs/core)](#应用核心)
- [路由系统 (@lytjs/router)](#路由系统)
- [状态管理 (@lytjs/store)](#状态管理)
- [模板编译器 (@lytjs/compiler)](#模板编译器)
- [渲染器 (@lytjs/renderer)](#渲染器)
- [CLI 工具 (@lytjs/cli)](#cli-工具)
- [插件](#插件)
- [Web Component 适配器 (@lytjs/adapter-web-component)](#web-component-适配器)
- [WASM 编译器 (@lytjs/compiler-wasm)](#wasm-编译器)
- [错误码模块 (@lytjs/error-codes)](#错误码模块)
- [DevTools 扩展 (@lytjs/devtools)](#devtools-扩展)
- [测试框架 (@lytjs/test-utils)](#测试框架)

---

## 项目概览

Lyt.js 是一个零运行时依赖的超轻量前端框架, 基于 ES6 Proxy 实现响应式系统, 提供完整的组件化开发体验。

**设计哲学**: 纯原生、零依赖、轻写轻跑、所见即代码

**特性**:
- 所有 17 个核心包运行时零外部依赖
- Proxy 响应式系统 (reactive/ref/computed/watch)
- 虚拟 DOM + Block Tree + PatchFlag + LIS diff 算法
- 多平台渲染 (DOM/SSR/Native/MiniApp)
- Composition API + Options API 双模式
- 增强型 HTML 模板语法 (无 v- 前缀)
- Pinia 风格状态管理
- 响应式路由系统

---

## 架构设计

```
App Layer (createApp, 插件系统)
    |
Engine Layer
    |-- @lytjs/reactivity  (Proxy 响应式)
    |-- @lytjs/compiler    (模板编译: parse -> transform -> optimize -> generate)
    |-- @lytjs/vdom        (虚拟 DOM: Block Tree + PatchFlag + LIS diff)
    |-- @lytjs/component   (组件系统: defineComponent, Composition API)
    |
Platform Adapter
    |-- DOM Renderer     (浏览器)
    |-- SSR Renderer     (服务端)
    |-- Native Renderer  (原生)
    |-- MiniApp Renderer (小程序)
```

---

## 核心包列表

| 包名 | 说明 |
|------|------|
| `@lytjs/reactivity` | Proxy 响应式系统 (reactive, ref, computed, watch, effect, nextTick) |
| `@lytjs/compiler` | 模板编译器 (compile, parseHTML, transform, optimize, generate, parseSFC, compileSFC) |
| `@lytjs/vdom` | 虚拟 DOM (Block Tree + PatchFlag + LIS diff) |
| `@lytjs/renderer` | 多平台渲染器 (DOM, SSR, Native, MiniApp) |
| `@lytjs/component` | 组件系统 (defineComponent, Composition API, KeepAlive, Suspense, Transition) |
| `@lytjs/core` | 应用创建 (createApp, h, Fragment) |
| `@lytjs/router` | 响应式路由 (createRouter, createWebHistory, createHashHistory) |
| `@lytjs/store` | Pinia 风格状态管理 (createStore, getStore, getStoreIds) |
| `@lytjs/cli` | CLI 工具 (dev, build) |
| `@lytjs/devtools` | 开发者工具 (RoutePanel, PerfPanel) |
| `@lytjs/components` | UI 组件库 |
| `@lytjs/plugin-i18n` | 国际化插件 |
| `@lytjs/plugin-auth` | 认证插件 |
| `@lytjs/test-utils` | 测试框架 |
| `@lytjs/adapter-web-component` | Web Component 适配器 (defineCustomElement, registerComponents) |
| `@lytjs/compiler-wasm` | WASM 编译器 (WasmCompiler, WasmParser, WasmGenerator) |
| `@lytjs/error-codes` | 错误码模块 (CLI/DevTools/Plugin/SSR) |

---

## 模板语法

Lyt.js 使用增强型 HTML 模板语法, **不使用 v- 前缀**, 更接近原生 HTML。

### 条件渲染

```html
<div if="show">显示内容</div>
<div if="type === 'a'">类型 A</div>
```

### 列表渲染

```html
<ul>
  <li each="item in items">{{ item.name }}</li>
</ul>
<ul>
  <li each="(item, index) in items">{{ index }}: {{ item.name }}</li>
</ul>
```

### 属性绑定

```html
<div bind:class="className" bind:style="styleObj" bind:data-id="id"></div>
```

### 事件绑定

```html
<button on:click="handleClick">点击</button>
<button on:click="count++">点击 +1</button>
<input on:input="handleInput($event)">
```

### 双向绑定

```html
<input model="username">
<textarea model="content"></textarea>
```

### 插值

```html
<span>{{ message }}</span>
<span>{{ count + 1 }}</span>
<span>{{ formatDate(date) }}</span>
```

---

## 响应式系统

> 包: `@lytjs/reactivity`
> 基于 ES6 Proxy 实现, 零外部依赖

### reactive

创建深层响应式代理对象。

```ts
function reactive<T extends object>(
  target: T,
  options?: ReactiveOptions
): T

interface ReactiveOptions {
  deep?: boolean    // 是否深层响应式 (默认 true)
  readonly?: boolean // 是否只读 (默认 false)
}
```

```ts
import { reactive } from '@lytjs/reactivity'

const state = reactive({ count: 0, nested: { foo: 'bar' } })
effect(() => console.log(state.count))  // 0
state.count++  // 触发 effect, 输出 1
state.nested.foo = 'baz'  // 深层响应式, 也会触发
```

**特性**:
- 自动深层代理嵌套对象
- 数组方法完整支持 (includes, indexOf, push, pop, splice 等)
- 同一原始对象始终返回同一代理 (WeakMap 缓存)
- 支持 `for...in`, `Object.keys()` 等迭代器依赖收集

### ref

创建 Ref 引用, 用于包装基本类型值。

```ts
function ref<T = any>(value: T): Ref<T>

interface Ref<T = any> {
  value: T
  [refSymbol]: true
}
```

```ts
import { ref } from '@lytjs/reactivity'

const count = ref(0)
effect(() => console.log(count.value))  // 0
count.value++  // 触发 effect, 输出 1

// 包装对象时自动深层响应式
const obj = ref({ name: 'lyt' })
obj.value.name = 'new'  // 触发 effect
```

### shallowRef

浅层 Ref, 不对嵌套对象进行深层代理。

```ts
function shallowRef<T = any>(value: T): Ref<T>
```

```ts
const state = shallowRef({ count: 0 })
effect(() => console.log(state.value.count))  // 0
state.value.count++  // 不会触发 effect (浅层)
state.value = { count: 1 }  // 触发 effect (替换了 .value)
```

### computed

创建计算属性, 基于依赖缓存。

```ts
// 只读计算属性
function computed<T = any>(getter: ComputedGetter<T>): ComputedRef<T>

// 可写计算属性
function computed<T = any>(options: WritableComputedOptions<T>): WritableComputedRef<T>

type ComputedGetter<T> = () => T
type ComputedSetter<T> = (value: T) => void
interface WritableComputedOptions<T> {
  get: ComputedGetter<T>
  set: ComputedSetter<T>
}
interface ComputedRef<T> extends Ref<T> {
  readonly value: T
}
```

```ts
import { ref, computed } from '@lytjs/reactivity'

const count = ref(1)
const double = computed(() => count.value * 2)
console.log(double.value)  // 2
count.value = 5
console.log(double.value)  // 10

// 可写计算属性
const firstName = ref('Lyt')
const lastName = ref('JS')
const fullName = computed({
  get: () => firstName.value + ' ' + lastName.value,
  set: (val) => {
    const [first, last] = val.split(' ')
    firstName.value = first
    lastName.value = last
  }
})
fullName.value = 'Hello World'  // firstName = 'Hello', lastName = 'World'
```

**实现原理**: dirty 标记 + 惰性求值 + 依赖传播。内部维护 ReactiveEffect, getter 作为副作用函数。

### watch

侦听响应式数据源, 数据变化时执行回调。

```ts
function watch<T = any>(
  source: WatchSource<T> | WatchSource<T>[],
  cb: WatchCallback<T>,
  options?: WatchOptions
): WatchStopHandle

type WatchSource<T> = Ref<T> | (() => T) | { [key: string]: any }
type WatchCallback<T, O = T> = (
  newValue: T,
  oldValue: O,
  onCleanup: (cleanupFn: () => void) => void
) => void
interface WatchOptions {
  immediate?: boolean    // 是否立即执行 (默认 false)
  deep?: boolean         // 是否深度侦听 (reactive 对象默认 true)
  flush?: 'pre' | 'post' | 'sync'  // 刷新时机
}
type WatchStopHandle = () => void
```

```ts
import { ref, reactive, watch } from '@lytjs/reactivity'

// 侦听 ref
const count = ref(0)
const stop = watch(count, (newVal, oldVal) => {
  console.log(`count: ${oldVal} -> ${newVal}`)
})
count.value++  // 输出: count: 0 -> 1
stop()  // 停止侦听

// 侦听 getter
watch(
  () => state.count + state.name,
  (newVal, oldVal) => console.log(newVal, oldVal)
)

// 侦听多个源
watch([count, name], ([newCount, newName], [oldCount, oldName]) => {
  console.log(newCount, newName)
})

// 立即执行
watch(count, (val) => console.log(val), { immediate: true })

// 带清理函数 (处理异步竞态)
watch(searchQuery, async (newQuery, oldQuery, onCleanup) => {
  const controller = new AbortController()
  onCleanup(() => controller.abort())
  const data = await fetch(`/api?q=${newQuery}`, { signal: controller.signal })
  results.value = data
})
```

### watchEffect

自动追踪依赖并立即执行。

```ts
function watchEffect(
  fn: (onCleanup: (cleanupFn: () => void) => void) => void,
  options?: WatchEffectOptions
): WatchStopHandle

interface WatchEffectOptions {
  onTrack?: (event: any) => void
  onTrigger?: (event: any) => void
  flush?: 'pre' | 'post' | 'sync'
}
```

```ts
import { ref, watchEffect } from '@lytjs/reactivity'

const count = ref(0)
const stop = watchEffect(() => {
  console.log(`count is: ${count.value}`)
})
// 立即输出: count is: 0
count.value++  // 输出: count is: 1
stop()

// 带清理函数
watchEffect((onCleanup) => {
  const timer = setInterval(() => console.log('tick'), 1000)
  onCleanup(() => clearInterval(timer))  // 依赖变化时清理
})
```

### effect

原始响应式副作用。

```ts
function effect(
  fn: EffectFn,
  options?: ReactiveEffectOptions
): { effect: ReactiveEffect; (): any }

type EffectFn = () => any
interface ReactiveEffectOptions {
  scheduler?: (effect: ReactiveEffect) => void  // 自定义调度器
  lazy?: boolean                                  // 惰性执行 (默认 false)
  beforeRun?: () => void
  afterRun?: () => void
  allowRecurse?: boolean
  id?: number
}
```

```ts
import { reactive, effect, stop } from '@lytjs/reactivity'

const obj = reactive({ count: 0 })
const runner = effect(() => {
  console.log(obj.count)
})
obj.count++  // 自动触发副作用重新执行
runner.effect.stop()  // 停止副作用
// 或
stop(runner)
```

### nextTick

等待下一个 DOM 更新 tick。

```ts
function nextTick(): Promise<void>
```

```ts
import { nextTick } from '@lytjs/reactivity'

await nextTick()
// 此时 DOM 已更新完毕

nextTick().then(() => {
  console.log('更新完成')
})
```

### 工具函数

```ts
// 获取原始对象
function toRaw<T>(observed: T): T

// 判断是否为响应式代理
function isReactive(value: unknown): boolean

// 判断是否为只读代理
function isReadonly(value: unknown): boolean

// 判断是否为 Ref
function isRef(value: unknown): value is Ref

// 自动解包 Ref
function unref<T>(value: T | Ref<T>): T

// 为对象属性创建 Ref (双向同步)
function toRef<T extends object, K extends keyof T>(object: T, key: K): Ref<T[K]>

// 将对象所有属性转为 Ref
function toRefs<T extends object>(object: T): { [K in keyof T]: Ref<T[K]> }

// 创建只读代理
function readonly<T extends object>(target: T): T

// 浅层响应式代理
function shallowReactive<T extends object>(target: T): T

// 手动触发 Ref 更新
function triggerRef(ref: Ref): void
```

```ts
const state = reactive({ count: 0, name: 'lyt' })

toRaw(state)              // 获取原始对象
isReactive(state)         // true
isRef(ref(1))             // true
unref(ref(5))             // 5

const countRef = toRef(state, 'count')
countRef.value++          // state.count 也变为 1

const refs = toRefs(state)
refs.count.value++        // state.count 也变为 2

const ro = readonly(state)
ro.count = 5              // console.warn: target is readonly

const shallow = shallowReactive({ nested: { foo: 1 } })
shallow.nested.foo = 2    // 不会触发更新 (浅层)
```

---

## 组件系统

> 包: `@lytjs/component`
> 支持选项式 API 和 Composition API

### defineComponent

定义组件。

```ts
function defineComponent(options: ComponentOptions): ComponentDefine

interface ComponentOptions {
  name?: string                                          // 组件名称
  props?: string[] | Record<string, PropOptions | PropType | PropType[]>  // Props 声明
  state?: () => Record<string, any>                      // 响应式数据 (工厂函数)
  computed?: ComputedOptions                             // 计算属性
  watch?: WatchOptions                                   // 侦听器
  methods?: Record<string, (...args: any[]) => any>      // 方法
  template?: string                                      // 模板字符串
  render?: RenderFunction                                // 渲染函数 (优先于 template)
  init?: (this: ComponentPublicInstance, props, state) => void | Record<string, any>  // 初始化
  setup?: SetupFunction                                  // Composition API
  emits?: EmitsOptions                                   // 事件声明
  slots?: SlotChildren                                   // 默认插槽
}

interface ComputedOptions {
  [key: string]: {
    get: () => any
    set?: (value: any) => void
  }
}

type RenderFunction = (h: CreateElement, instance: ComponentInternalInstance) => any
type SetupFunction = (props: any, ctx: any) => object | Function
```

**选项式 API 示例**:

```ts
import { defineComponent } from '@lytjs/component'

const MyComponent = defineComponent({
  name: 'MyComponent',
  props: {
    title: { type: String, default: 'Hello' },
    count: { type: Number, required: true }
  },
  state() {
    return { inner: 0 }
  },
  computed: {
    double: {
      get() { return this.inner * 2 }
    }
  },
  watch: {
    inner: {
      handler(newVal, oldVal) { console.log('inner changed:', newVal) },
      immediate: true
    }
  },
  methods: {
    increment() {
      this.$setState({ inner: this.$state.inner + 1 })
    }
  },
  init(props, state) {
    console.log('组件初始化', props.title)
  },
  render(h, instance) {
    return h('div', null, [
      h('h2', null, this.title),
      h('p', null, `inner: ${this.inner}, double: ${this.double}`),
      h('button', { onClick: () => this.increment() }, '+1')
    ])
  }
})
```

**Composition API 示例**:

```ts
import { defineComponent } from '@lytjs/component'
import { ref, computed, watch, onMounted, onUnmounted, provide, inject } from '@lytjs/reactivity'

const Counter = defineComponent({
  props: { initialCount: { type: Number, default: 0 } },
  setup(props, ctx) {
    const count = ref(props.initialCount)
    const double = computed(() => count.value * 2)

    provide('counter', count)

    onMounted(() => {
      console.log('mounted, count:', count.value)
    })

    watch(count, (newVal) => {
      console.log('count changed:', newVal)
    })

    return {
      count,
      double,
      increment: () => count.value++,
      decrement: () => count.value--
    }
  },
  template: `
    <div>
      <p>Count: {{ count }}</p>
      <p>Double: {{ double }}</p>
      <button on:click="increment">+</button>
      <button on:click="decrement">-</button>
    </div>
  `
})
```

### h (渲染函数)

创建虚拟节点。

```ts
function h(
  type: string | object | symbol,
  props?: Props,
  children?: Children
): VNode

type Props = Record<string, any> | null
type Children = string | number | VNode | Children[]

interface VNode {
  type: string | object | symbol
  props: Record<string, any> | null
  children: string | VNode[] | Record<string, any> | null
  key: string | number | null
  ref: ((el: any) => void) | { current: any } | null
  shapeFlag: number
  el: any
  component: any
}
```

```ts
import { h, Fragment } from '@lytjs/core'

// 创建元素
h('div', { class: 'container', id: 'app' }, [
  h('h1', null, 'Hello Lyt.js'),
  h('p', { style: { color: 'red' } }, 'This is a paragraph'),
  h('button', { onClick: () => console.log('clicked') }, 'Click me'),
])

// 创建组件
h(MyComponent, { title: 'Props', onCustom: handleEvent }, [
  h('span', null, 'Slot content'),
])

// 使用 Fragment (多根节点)
h(Fragment, null, [h('li', null, 'Item 1'), h('li', null, 'Item 2')])

// 带 key 的列表
items.map(item => h('li', { key: item.id }, item.name))
```

### Fragment

Fragment 占位符, 用于多根节点组件。

```ts
import { Fragment } from '@lytjs/core'

// Symbol 类型, 用作 h() 的第一个参数
h(Fragment, null, [child1, child2, child3])
```

### 内置组件

#### KeepAlive

缓存组件实例, 避免重复创建和销毁。

```ts
import { KeepAlive } from '@lytjs/component'

interface KeepAliveProps {
  include?: string | RegExp | (string | RegExp)[]
  exclude?: string | RegExp | (string | RegExp)[]
  max?: number
}
```

#### Suspense

异步组件边界, 处理异步依赖。

```ts
import { Suspense } from '@lytjs/component'

interface SuspenseProps {
  fallback?: any  // 加载中显示的内容
}
```

#### Transition / TransitionGroup

过渡动画组件。

```ts
import { Transition, TransitionGroup } from '@lytjs/component'

interface TransitionProps {
  name?: string
  appear?: boolean
  css?: boolean
  // ...更多过渡选项
}
```

#### defineAsyncComponent

定义异步组件。

```ts
import { defineAsyncComponent } from '@lytjs/component'

interface AsyncComponentOptions {
  loader: () => Promise<any>
  loadingComponent?: any
  errorComponent?: any
  delay?: number
  timeout?: number
}
```

```ts
const AsyncComp = defineAsyncComponent({
  loader: () => import('./MyComponent.js'),
  loadingComponent: LoadingSpinner,
  errorComponent: ErrorDisplay,
  delay: 200,
  timeout: 3000
})
```

### Composition API

#### setup

在 defineComponent 中使用 Composition API。

```ts
setup(props, ctx): object | Function
// ctx 包含: { attrs, slots, emit }
// 返回对象: 合并到组件上下文
// 返回函数: 作为渲染函数
```

#### provide / inject

依赖注入。

```ts
function provide<T>(key: string | symbol, value: T): void
function inject<T>(key: string | symbol, defaultValue?: T): T | undefined
```

```ts
// 祖先组件
setup(props, ctx) {
  provide('theme', 'dark')
  provide('config', reactive({ debug: true }))
}

// 后代组件
setup(props, ctx) {
  const theme = inject<string>('theme')              // 'dark'
  const config = inject('config', { debug: false })  // 使用默认值
}
```

#### getCurrentInstance

获取当前组件实例。

```ts
function getCurrentInstance(): ComponentInternalInstance | null
```

```ts
setup(props, ctx) {
  const instance = getCurrentInstance()
  console.log(instance.name)  // 组件名称
}
```

#### 生命周期钩子

```ts
function onMounted(hook: () => void): void
function onUnmounted(hook: () => void): void
function onUpdated(hook: () => void): void
function onBeforeMount(hook: () => void): void
function onBeforeUnmount(hook: () => void): void
```

```ts
import { onMounted, onUnmounted, onUpdated, onBeforeMount, onBeforeUnmount } from '@lytjs/component'

setup(props, ctx) {
  onBeforeMount(() => {
    console.log('组件即将挂载')
  })

  onMounted(() => {
    console.log('组件已挂载')
    // 可以访问 DOM
  })

  onUpdated(() => {
    console.log('组件已更新')
  })

  onBeforeUnmount(() => {
    console.log('组件即将卸载')
    // 清理工作
  })

  onUnmounted(() => {
    console.log('组件已卸载')
  })
}
```

### 组件公共实例

组件内部通过 `this` (renderProxy) 访问的接口:

```ts
interface ComponentPublicInstance {
  $name?: string
  $props: Record<string, any>          // 只读 props
  $state: Record<string, any>          // 响应式状态
  $slots: Slots                        // 插槽
  $isMounted: boolean                  // 是否已挂载
  $emit: EmitFunction                  // 触发事件
  $forceUpdate: () => void             // 强制更新
  $unmount: () => void                 // 卸载组件
  $setState: (partial: Record<string, any>) => void  // 设置状态
}
```

---

## 应用核心

> 包: `@lytjs/core`

### createApp

创建应用实例。

```ts
function createApp(
  rootComponent: ComponentOptions | (() => VNode),
  rootProps?: Record<string, any>
): App
```

```ts
import { createApp, h } from '@lytjs/core'

const app = createApp({
  name: 'App',
  state: () => ({
    count: 0,
    message: 'Hello Lyt.js',
  }),
  render() {
    return h('div', { class: 'app' }, [
      h('h1', null, this.message),
      h('p', null, `Count: ${this.count}`),
      h('button', { onClick: () => this.count++ }, 'Increment'),
    ])
  },
})

app.use(myPlugin)
app.provide('config', { theme: 'dark' })
app.component('MyButton', MyButtonComponent)
app.mount('#app')
```

### App 实例方法

```ts
interface App {
  mount(container: string | Element): App    // 挂载到 DOM
  unmount(): void                             // 卸载应用
  use(plugin: Plugin, ...options: any[]): App // 安装插件
  unuse(plugin: Plugin): App                 // 卸载插件 (v3.1.0)
  isInstalled(plugin: Plugin): boolean       // 检测插件是否已安装 (v3.1.0)
  provide<T>(key: string | symbol, value: T): App  // 提供依赖
  inject<T>(key: string | symbol, defaultValue?: T): T | undefined  // 获取依赖
  component(name: string, component: ComponentOptions): App  // 注册全局组件
  component(name: string): ComponentOptions | undefined  // 获取全局组件
  directive(name: string, directive: DirectiveHooks): App  // 注册全局指令
  directive(name: string): DirectiveHooks | undefined  // 获取全局指令
  config: AppConfig                           // 全局配置
  globalProperties: Record<string, any>       // 全局属性
}
```

### 自定义指令

```ts
interface DirectiveHooks {
  created?: (el: any, binding: DirectiveBinding) => void
  beforeMount?: (el: any, binding: DirectiveBinding) => void
  mounted?: (el: any, binding: DirectiveBinding) => void
  beforeUpdate?: (el: any, binding: DirectiveBinding) => void
  updated?: (el: any, binding: DirectiveBinding) => void
  beforeUnmount?: (el: any, binding: DirectiveBinding) => void
  unmounted?: (el: any, binding: DirectiveBinding) => void
}

interface DirectiveBinding {
  value: any
  oldValue: any
  arg?: string
  modifiers: Record<string, boolean>
  instance: any
}
```

```ts
app.directive('focus', {
  mounted(el) {
    el.focus()
  }
})
```

### 错误处理

```ts
import { LytError, handleError, ErrorBoundary } from '@lytjs/core'

// 全局错误处理
handleError(error, instance, info)

// 错误边界组件
const ErrorComp = defineComponent({
  // ErrorBoundary 选项
})
```

---

## 路由系统

> 包: `@lytjs/router`
> 基于 @lytjs/reactivity 实现响应式路由

### createRouter

创建路由实例。

```ts
function createRouter(options: RouterOptions): Router

interface RouterOptions {
  mode: 'history' | 'hash'     // 路由模式
  routes: RouteRecord[]         // 路由配置
  base?: string                 // 基础路径 (仅 history 模式, 默认 '/')
}

interface RouteRecord {
  path: string
  name?: string
  component?: any
  meta?: Record<string, any>
  children?: RouteRecord[]
  redirect?: string
}
```

```ts
import { createRouter, createWebHistory } from '@lytjs/router'

const router = createRouter({
  mode: 'history',
  routes: [
    { path: '/', name: 'home', component: Home },
    { path: '/user/:id', name: 'user', component: User, meta: { auth: true } },
    {
      path: '/admin',
      component: AdminLayout,
      children: [
        { path: '', component: Dashboard },
        { path: 'settings', component: Settings },
      ]
    }
  ],
  base: '/app'
})
```

### Router 实例

```ts
interface Router {
  currentRoute: Ref<Route>     // 响应式当前路由
  push(path: string): Promise<void>     // 导航 (新增历史记录)
  replace(path: string): Promise<void>  // 替换 (不新增历史记录)
  go(n: number): void                    // 前进/后退 n 步
  back(): void                           // 后退
  forward(): void                        // 前进
  beforeEach(guard: NavigationGuard): () => void      // 全局前置守卫
  afterEach(guard: (to: Route, from: Route) => void): () => void  // 全局后置守卫
  beforeResolve(guard: NavigationGuard): () => void   // 全局解析守卫
  addRoute(route: RouteRecord): void      // 动态添加路由
  removeRoute(name: string): void         // 移除路由
  getRoutes(): RouteRecord[]              // 获取所有路由记录
  install(app: any): void                 // 插件安装
  destroy(): void                         // 销毁路由
}
```

### Route 对象

```ts
interface Route {
  path: string                          // 路由路径
  fullPath: string                      // 完整路径
  params: Record<string, string>        // 路由参数
  name?: string                         // 路由名称
  meta?: Record<string, any>            // 元信息
  query: Record<string, string>         // 查询参数
  hash: string                          // hash 值
  matched: RouteRecord[]                // 匹配的路由记录
}
```

### 导航守卫

```ts
type NavigationGuard = (
  to: NavigationTarget,
  from: NavigationTarget,
  next: NavigationGuardNext
) => void

type NavigationGuardNext = (location?: string | false | void) => void
```

```ts
// 全局前置守卫
const removeGuard = router.beforeEach((to, from, next) => {
  if (to.meta.auth && !isLoggedIn) {
    next('/login')     // 重定向
  } else if (to.path === '/forbidden') {
    next(false)        // 取消导航
  } else {
    next()             // 确认导航
  }
})

// 全局后置守卫
router.afterEach((to, from) => {
  document.title = to.meta.title || 'Lyt App'
  console.log('导航完成:', to.path)
})

// 移除守卫
removeGuard()
```

### History 模式

```ts
import { createWebHistory, createHashHistory } from '@lytjs/router'

// HTML5 History 模式
const history = createWebHistory('/app')
history.push('/user/123')
history.back()
history.listen((to, from) => {
  console.log('路由变化:', from.path, '->', to.path)
})

// Hash 模式
const hashHistory = createHashHistory()
hashHistory.push('/user/123')  // URL 变为 http://example.com/#/user/123
```

---

## 状态管理

> 包: `@lytjs/store`
> Pinia 风格, 基于 @lytjs/reactivity

### createStore

创建 Store (返回工厂函数, 即 use 函数模式)。

```ts
function createStore<S extends Record<string, any>>(
  id: string,
  options?: StoreOptions<S>
): () => StoreApi<S>

interface StoreOptions<S> {
  state?: S | (() => S)                                    // 初始状态
  getters?: Record<string, (state: S) => any>              // 计算属性
  actions?: Record<string, (this: StoreApi<S>, ...args: any[]) => any>  // 操作方法
  modules?: Record<string, ModuleOptions>                  // 子模块
}

interface StoreApi<S> {
  $id: string                           // Store 唯一标识
  state: S                              // 响应式状态
  getters: Record<string, any>          // 计算属性
  actions: Record<string, (...args: any[]) => any>  // 操作方法
  $expose(): { state: S; getters: Record<string, any> }
  $reset(): void                        // 重置到初始状态
  $subscribe(callback: SubscriptionCallback): () => void  // 订阅变化
  $dispose(): void                      // 销毁 Store
  $patch(partialOrFn: Partial<S> | ((state: S) => void)): void  // 批量更新
  use(plugin: StorePlugin): () => void  // 安装插件
  $onAction(callback: (action: { name: string, args: any[] }) => void): () => void  // 拦截 action
}
```

```ts
import { createStore, getStore, getStoreIds } from '@lytjs/store'

// 定义 Store
const useCounterStore = createStore('counter', {
  state: () => ({
    count: 0,
    name: 'lyt',
  }),
  getters: {
    doubleCount: (state) => state.count * 2,
  },
  actions: {
    increment() {
      this.state.count++
    },
    async fetchData() {
      const data = await fetch('/api')
      this.state.name = data.name
    },
  },
})

// 使用 Store
const store = useCounterStore()
console.log(store.state.count)         // 0
console.log(store.getters.doubleCount)  // 0
store.actions.increment()
console.log(store.state.count)         // 1

// 批量更新
store.$patch({ count: 10, name: 'updated' })
store.$patch((state) => { state.count++ })

// 订阅变化
const unsubscribe = store.$subscribe((mutation, state) => {
  console.log(`${mutation.type}: ${mutation.key}`, mutation.newValue)
})

// 拦截 action
store.$onAction(({ name, args }) => {
  console.log(`action ${name} called with`, args)
})

// 重置
store.$reset()

// 销毁
store.$dispose()

// 注册表
getStore('counter')   // 获取已注册的 Store
getStoreIds()         // ['counter']
```

### 模块化

```ts
const useAppStore = createStore('app', {
  state: () => ({ theme: 'light' }),
  modules: {
    user: {
      state: () => ({ name: '', token: '' }),
      getters: {
        isLoggedIn: (state) => !!state.token
      },
      actions: {
        login(token) { this.state.token = token }
      }
    }
  }
})

const store = useAppStore()
store.state.user.name              // 访问模块 state
store.getters['user/isLoggedIn']   // 访问模块 getter (带命名空间)
store.actions['user/login']('abc') // 调用模块 action (带命名空间)
```

### Store 插件

```ts
interface StorePlugin {
  install: (store: StoreApi) => (() => void) | void
}

// 持久化插件示例
const persistencePlugin = {
  install(store) {
    const key = `lyt-store-${store.$id}`
    const saved = localStorage.getItem(key)
    if (saved) {
      store.$patch(JSON.parse(saved))
    }
    const unsub = store.$subscribe((mutation, state) => {
      localStorage.setItem(key, JSON.stringify(state))
    })
    return unsub
  }
}

store.use(persistencePlugin)
```

---

## 模板编译器

> 包: `@lytjs/compiler`
> 四阶段编译: parse -> transform -> optimize -> generate

### compile

编译模板字符串为渲染函数代码。

```ts
function compile(template: string, options?: CompileOptions): CompileResult

interface CompileResult {
  code: string          // 生成的渲染函数代码
  ast: RootNode         // AST 根节点
  hoistResult: HoistResult  // 静态优化结果
  helpers: string[]     // 需要导入的辅助函数列表
}
```

```ts
import { compile } from '@lytjs/compiler'

const { code } = compile('<div class="app">{{ message }}</div>')
// code: "h('div', { 'class': 'app' }, _ctx.message)"

// 运行时使用
const renderFn = new Function('h', '_ctx', `return ${code}`)
const vnode = renderFn(h, proxy)
```

### parseHTML

解析 HTML 模板为 AST。

```ts
function parseHTML(template: string): RootNode
```

### transform

对 AST 进行语义转换 (处理指令, 标记动态节点)。

```ts
function transform(root: RootNode, options?: TransformOptions): void
```

### optimize

静态分析, 标记静态子树, 收集可提升节点。

```ts
function optimize(root: RootNode): HoistResult
```

### generate

将 AST 转换为渲染函数代码。

```ts
function generate(root: RootNode, options?: CodegenOptions): CodegenResult
```

### SFC 支持

```ts
// 解析 .lyt 单文件组件
function parseSFC(source: string): SFCDescriptor

interface SFCDescriptor {
  template?: SFCBlock
  script?: SFCBlock
  styles: SFCStyleBlock[]
}

// 编译 SFC
function compileSFC(descriptor: SFCDescriptor): SFCCompileResult

interface SFCCompileResult {
  code: string       // 生成的 JS 代码
  styles: string[]   // CSS 样式 (经过 scoped 改写)
  scopedId: string   // scoped 属性标识 (如 data-v-abc123)
}

// Scoped CSS
function scopeCSS(css: string, id: string): string
```

```ts
import { parseSFC, compileSFC, scopeCSS } from '@lytjs/compiler'

// .lyt 文件内容
const source = `
<template>
  <div class="app">{{ message }}</div>
</template>

<script>
export default {
  state: () => ({ message: 'Hello' })
}
</script>

<style scoped>
.app { color: red; }
</style>
`

const descriptor = parseSFC(source)
const result = compileSFC(descriptor)
console.log(result.code)     // JS 模块代码
console.log(result.styles)   // ['.app[data-v-abc123] { color: red; }']
```

---

## 渲染器

> 包: `@lytjs/renderer`
> 支持多平台: DOM, SSR, Native, MiniApp

### createRenderer

创建渲染器实例。

```ts
function createRenderer(renderer: LytRenderer): RendererInstance

interface RendererInstance {
  mount(vnode: VNode, container: any): void
  patch(oldVNode: VNode | null, newVNode: VNode, container: any): void
  unmount(vnode: VNode, container?: any): void
}
```

### LytRenderer 接口

```ts
interface LytRenderer {
  createElement(tag: string): any
  createText(text: string): any
  createComment(text: string): any
  setAttribute(el: any, key: string, val: any): void
  removeAttribute(el: any, key: string): void
  setStyle(el: any, style: object | string): void
  setClass(el: any, cls: string | object): void
  insert(parent: any, child: any, ref?: any): void
  remove(child: any): void
  replace(parent: any, oldChild: any, newChild: any): void
  addEventListener(el: any, event: string, handler: Function, options?: any): void
  removeEventListener(el: any, event: string, handler: Function): void
  nextTick(cb: Function): void
  parentNode(el: any): any
  nextSibling(el: any): any
  querySelector(selector: string): any
}
```

### SSR 渲染

```ts
import { StringRenderer, ssrRenderer, renderToString } from '@lytjs/renderer'

// 将 VNode 渲染为 HTML 字符串
const html = renderToString(vnode)
```

### Hydration

```ts
import { hydrate } from '@lytjs/renderer'

// 将 SSR HTML 水合为交互式应用
hydrate(vnode, container)
```

### 预置渲染器

```ts
import { DOMRenderer, domRenderer } from '@lytjs/renderer'        // DOM
import { StringRenderer, ssrRenderer } from '@lytjs/renderer'     // SSR
import { NativeRenderer, nativeRenderer } from '@lytjs/renderer'  // 原生
import { MiniAppRenderer, miniAppRenderer } from '@lytjs/renderer' // 小程序
```

---

## CLI 工具

> 包: `@lytjs/cli`

```bash
# 创建项目
lyt create my-app

# 开发服务器
lyt dev

# 构建
lyt build
```

---

## 插件

### 插件开发

```ts
interface Plugin {
  install: (app: AppAPI, ...options: any[]) => void | Promise<void>  // 支持异步安装 (v3.1.0)
  beforeUnmount?: (app: AppAPI) => void   // 卸载前钩子 (v3.1.0)
  afterUnmount?: (app: AppAPI) => void    // 卸载后钩子 (v3.1.0)
}

// 示例插件
const myPlugin = {
  install(app, options) {
    app.provide('plugin-options', options)
    app.globalProperties.$myMethod = () => {}
  }
}

app.use(myPlugin, { debug: true })
app.unuse(myPlugin)              // 卸载插件 (v3.1.0)
app.isInstalled(myPlugin)        // 检测插件是否已安装, 返回 boolean (v3.1.0)

// 异步插件示例 (v3.1.0)
const asyncPlugin = {
  async install(app, options) {
    const lib = await import('external-lib')
    app.provide('lib', lib.default)
  },
  beforeUnmount(app) {
    console.log('插件即将卸载')
  },
  afterUnmount(app) {
    console.log('插件已卸载')
  }
}
```

### 国际化 (@lytjs/plugin-i18n)

```ts
import { createI18n } from '@lytjs/plugin-i18n'

const i18n = createI18n({
  locale: 'zh',
  messages: {
    zh: { hello: '你好' },
    en: { hello: 'Hello' }
  }
})

app.use(i18n)
```

### 认证 (@lytjs/plugin-auth)

```ts
import { createAuth } from '@lytjs/plugin-auth'

const auth = createAuth({
  loginPath: '/login',
  authKey: 'token'
})

app.use(auth)
```

---

## Web Component 适配器

> 包: `@lytjs/adapter-web-component`
> 将 Lyt 组件转换为标准 Web Components, 支持在任意框架或原生 HTML 中使用

### defineCustomElement

将 Lyt 组件定义为自定义元素。

```ts
function defineCustomElement(
  component: ComponentOptions,
  options?: CustomElementOptions
): CustomElementConstructor

interface CustomElementOptions {
  shadowRoot?: boolean    // 是否使用 Shadow DOM (默认 true)
  styles?: string[]       // 注入的样式
}
```

```ts
import { defineCustomElement } from '@lytjs/adapter-web-component'
import { ref } from '@lytjs/reactivity'

const MyButton = defineCustomElement({
  props: { label: { type: String, default: 'Click' } },
  setup(props) {
    const count = ref(0)
    return { count, label: props.label, increment: () => count.value++ }
  },
  template: `
    <button on:click="increment">{{ label }} ({{ count }})</button>
  `
})

// 注册到浏览器
customElements.define('my-button', MyButton)
```

### registerComponents

批量注册多个自定义元素。

```ts
function registerComponents(
  components: Record<string, CustomElementConstructor>
): void
```

```ts
import { defineCustomElement, registerComponents } from '@lytjs/adapter-web-component'

const elements = {
  'my-button': defineCustomElement(ButtonComponent),
  'my-input': defineCustomElement(InputComponent),
  'my-card': defineCustomElement(CardComponent),
}

registerComponents(elements)

// 在任意 HTML 中使用
// <my-button label="Hello"></my-button>
```

### unregisterElement

注销已注册的自定义元素。

```ts
function unregisterElement(name: string): void
```

```ts
import { unregisterElement } from '@lytjs/adapter-web-component'

unregisterElement('my-button')  // 从 customElements 中移除
```

### isBrowser

检测当前是否运行在浏览器环境。

```ts
const isBrowser: boolean
```

```ts
import { isBrowser } from '@lytjs/adapter-web-component'

if (isBrowser) {
  customElements.define('my-element', MyElement)
} else {
  console.log('当前非浏览器环境, 跳过 Web Component 注册')
}
```

### defineCustomElementFromSFC

直接从 SFC 源码创建自定义元素。

```ts
function defineCustomElementFromSFC(
  source: string,
  options?: CustomElementOptions
): CustomElementConstructor
```

```ts
import { defineCustomElementFromSFC } from '@lytjs/adapter-web-component'

const sfcSource = `
<template>
  <div class="counter">
    <span>{{ count }}</span>
    <button on:click="increment">+</button>
  </div>
</template>

<script>
export default {
  state: () => ({ count: 0 }),
  methods: { increment() { this.count++ } }
}
</script>

<style scoped>
.counter { padding: 8px; }
</style>
`

const MyCounter = defineCustomElementFromSFC(sfcSource)
customElements.define('my-counter', MyCounter)
```

---

## WASM 编译器

> 包: `@lytjs/compiler-wasm`
> 基于 WebAssembly 的高性能模板编译器, 编译速度比 JS 版本提升 3-5 倍

### WasmCompiler

WASM 编译器主类, 提供完整的模板编译流水线。

```ts
class WasmCompiler {
  constructor(options?: WasmCompilerOptions)

  compile(template: string, options?: CompileOptions): CompileResult
  compileSFC(source: string): SFCCompileResult
  dispose(): void
}

interface WasmCompilerOptions {
  mode?: 'production' | 'development'   // 编译模式
  inline?: boolean                       // 是否内联辅助函数
}
```

```ts
import { WasmCompiler } from '@lytjs/compiler-wasm'

const compiler = new WasmCompiler({ mode: 'production' })

const { code, ast } = compiler.compile('<div>{{ msg }}</div>')
console.log(code)  // h('div', null, _ctx.msg)

// 编译 SFC
const sfcResult = compiler.compileSFC(sfcSource)
console.log(sfcResult.code)    // JS 模块代码
console.log(sfcResult.styles)  // scoped CSS

compiler.dispose()  // 释放 WASM 内存
```

### WasmParser

WASM 模板解析器, 将 HTML 模板解析为 AST。

```ts
class WasmParser {
  parse(template: string): RootNode
  parseFragment(html: string): RootNode
}
```

```ts
import { WasmParser } from '@lytjs/compiler-wasm'

const parser = new WasmParser()
const ast = parser.parse('<div if="show">{{ message }}</div>')
// ast 包含完整的节点树, 含指令信息
```

### WasmGenerator

WASM 代码生成器, 将 AST 转换为渲染函数代码。

```ts
class WasmGenerator {
  generate(root: RootNode, options?: CodegenOptions): CodegenResult
}
```

```ts
import { WasmParser, WasmGenerator } from '@lytjs/compiler-wasm'

const parser = new WasmParser()
const generator = new WasmGenerator()

const ast = parser.parse('<div>{{ msg }}</div>')
const { code } = generator.generate(ast)
```

### WasmPlayground

WASM 交互式 Playground, 用于在线编辑和实时预览。

```ts
class WasmPlayground {
  constructor(container: HTMLElement, options?: PlaygroundOptions)

  setTemplate(template: string): void
  setScript(script: string): void
  setStyle(style: string): void
  getCompiledCode(): string
  preview(): void
  destroy(): void
}

interface PlaygroundOptions {
  theme?: 'light' | 'dark'
  autoPreview?: boolean
  height?: string
}
```

```ts
import { WasmPlayground } from '@lytjs/compiler-wasm'

const playground = new WasmPlayground(document.getElementById('editor'), {
  theme: 'dark',
  autoPreview: true,
})

playground.setTemplate('<div>{{ count }}</div>')
playground.setScript('state: () => ({ count: 0 })')
playground.preview()

// 获取编译产物
console.log(playground.getCompiledCode())
```

---

## 错误码模块

> 包: `@lytjs/error-codes`
> 统一的错误码定义, 覆盖 CLI、DevTools、插件、SSR 等模块

### ErrorCodes

```ts
enum ErrorCodes {
  // CLI 错误码 (1000-1999)
  CLI_INVALID_COMMAND = 1001,
  CLI_CONFIG_NOT_FOUND = 1002,
  CLI_BUILD_FAILED = 1003,
  CLI_DEV_SERVER_ERROR = 1004,

  // DevTools 错误码 (2000-2999)
  DEVTOOLS_CONNECTION_FAILED = 2001,
  DEVTOOLS_PROTOCOL_ERROR = 2002,
  DEVTOOLS_INSPECT_FAILED = 2003,

  // 插件错误码 (3000-3999)
  PLUGIN_INSTALL_FAILED = 3001,
  PLUGIN_INVALID_FORMAT = 3002,
  PLUGIN_UNINSTALL_FAILED = 3003,
  PLUGIN_LIFECYCLE_ERROR = 3004,

  // SSR 错误码 (4000-4999)
  SSR_RENDER_FAILED = 4001,
  SSR_HYDRATION_MISMATCH = 4002,
  SSR_STREAM_ERROR = 4003,
}
```

```ts
import { ErrorCodes, createError } from '@lytjs/error-codes'

// 使用错误码创建结构化错误
const err = createError(ErrorCodes.CLI_CONFIG_NOT_FOUND, 'lyt.config.js not found')
console.log(err.code)    // 1002
console.log(err.module)  // 'CLI'
console.log(err.message) // 'lyt.config.js not found'

// 在 try/catch 中处理
try {
  // ...
} catch (e) {
  if (e.code === ErrorCodes.SSR_HYDRATION_MISMATCH) {
    console.warn('水合不匹配, 执行客户端渲染降级')
  }
}
```

---

## DevTools 扩展

> 包: `@lytjs/devtools`
> v3.1.0 新增 MemoryTracker、RenderTracker、BatchAnalyzer 模块

### MemoryTracker

内存使用追踪器, 监控组件实例的内存分配和回收。

```ts
class MemoryTracker {
  start(interval?: number): void       // 开始追踪 (默认 1000ms 间隔)
  stop(): void                          // 停止追踪
  getSnapshot(): MemorySnapshot         // 获取当前快照
  getHistory(): MemorySnapshot[]        // 获取历史快照
  reset(): void                         // 重置数据
}

interface MemorySnapshot {
  timestamp: number
  componentCount: number                // 组件实例数量
  nodeCount: number                     // DOM 节点数量
  estimatedSize: number                 // 估算内存占用 (bytes)
  detachedNodes: number                 // 游离节点数量
}
```

```ts
import { MemoryTracker } from '@lytjs/devtools'

const tracker = new MemoryTracker()
tracker.start(2000)  // 每 2 秒采样

// 获取当前内存状态
const snapshot = tracker.getSnapshot()
console.log(`组件数: ${snapshot.componentCount}, 估算内存: ${snapshot.estimatedSize} bytes`)

// 检测内存泄漏
const history = tracker.getHistory()
const lastTwo = history.slice(-2)
if (lastTwo[1].componentCount > lastTwo[0].componentCount + 10) {
  console.warn('可能存在内存泄漏: 组件实例持续增长')
}

tracker.stop()
```

### RenderTracker

渲染性能追踪器, 记录每次渲染的时间和触发来源。

```ts
class RenderTracker {
  start(): void                          // 开始追踪
  stop(): void                           // 停止追踪
  getReport(): RenderReport              // 获取渲染报告
  getSlowRenders(threshold?: number): RenderEntry[]  // 获取慢渲染记录
  reset(): void                          // 重置数据
}

interface RenderReport {
  totalRenders: number
  avgDuration: number                    // 平均渲染耗时 (ms)
  maxDuration: number                    // 最大渲染耗时 (ms)
  entries: RenderEntry[]
}

interface RenderEntry {
  componentName: string
  duration: number                       // 渲染耗时 (ms)
  trigger: string                        // 触发来源 (state change / props change / force)
  timestamp: number
}
```

```ts
import { RenderTracker } from '@lytjs/devtools'

const tracker = new RenderTracker()
tracker.start()

// ... 应用运行一段时间后

const report = tracker.getReport()
console.log(`总渲染次数: ${report.totalRenders}`)
console.log(`平均耗时: ${report.avgDuration.toFixed(2)}ms`)

// 查找慢渲染 (>16ms)
const slow = tracker.getSlowRenders(16)
slow.forEach(entry => {
  console.warn(`慢渲染: ${entry.componentName} 耗时 ${entry.duration}ms, 触发: ${entry.trigger}`)
})

tracker.stop()
```

### BatchAnalyzer

批量更新分析器, 分析响应式批量更新的合并效率。

```ts
class BatchAnalyzer {
  analyze(updates: UpdateRecord[]): BatchAnalysisResult
  getMetrics(): BatchMetrics
  reset(): void
}

interface UpdateRecord {
  target: object
  key: string
  value: any
  timestamp: number
}

interface BatchAnalysisResult {
  totalUpdates: number                   // 总更新次数
  batchedUpdates: number                 // 批次数量
  mergeRate: number                      // 合并率 (0-1)
  savedRenders: number                   // 节省的渲染次数
  details: BatchDetail[]
}

interface BatchMetrics {
  avgBatchSize: number                   // 平均批次大小
  maxBatchSize: number                   // 最大批次大小
  avgFlushTime: number                   // 平均刷新耗时 (ms)
}
```

```ts
import { BatchAnalyzer } from '@lytjs/devtools'

const analyzer = new BatchAnalyzer()

// 分析一组更新记录
const result = analyzer.analyze([
  { target: state, key: 'count', value: 1, timestamp: Date.now() },
  { target: state, key: 'name', value: 'lyt', timestamp: Date.now() + 1 },
  { target: state, key: 'count', value: 2, timestamp: Date.now() + 2 },
])

console.log(`合并率: ${(result.mergeRate * 100).toFixed(1)}%`)
console.log(`节省渲染: ${result.savedRenders} 次`)

const metrics = analyzer.getMetrics()
console.log(`平均批次大小: ${metrics.avgBatchSize}`)
```

---

## 测试框架

> 包: `@lytjs/test-utils`
> v3.1.0 新增比较断言

### 新增断言

```ts
// 大于等于断言
function toBeGreaterThanOrEqual(expected: number): void

// 小于等于断言
function toBeLessThanOrEqual(expected: number): void
```

```ts
import { expect } from '@lytjs/test-utils'

// toBeGreaterThanOrEqual
expect(count).toBeGreaterThanOrEqual(0)       // count >= 0
expect(score).toBeGreaterThanOrEqual(60)      // score >= 60

// toBeLessThanOrEqual
expect(errorCount).toBeLessThanOrEqual(0)     // errorCount <= 0
expect(loadingTime).toBeLessThanOrEqual(1000) // loadingTime <= 1000ms

// 组合使用
expect(value).toBeGreaterThanOrEqual(10)
expect(value).toBeLessThanOrEqual(100)        // 10 <= value <= 100
```

---

## 关键约定

1. **模板指令无 v- 前缀**: 使用 `if`, `each`, `bind:`, `on:`, `model` 而非 `v-if`, `v-for` 等
2. **组件 state 使用工厂函数**: `state: () => ({ count: 0 })` 而非 `data: { count: 0 }`
3. **computed 使用对象形式**: `computed: { double: { get() { return this.count * 2 } } }`
4. **setup 返回对象合并到组件上下文, 返回函数作为渲染函数**
5. **Store 返回工厂函数 (use 函数模式)**: `const useX = createStore('x', ...); const store = useX()`
6. **路由 currentRoute 是 Ref<Route>**: 通过 `.value` 访问当前路由对象
7. **所有包零运行时依赖**: 纯原生 ES6+ 实现
8. **编译产物兼容 CSP**: 生成的代码不使用 `with` 语句, 所有上下文通过 `_ctx.` 前缀访问
